name: Yang Xiao Long // Ritual Dancer
description:
After destroying the shrine of the local flavor, team RWBY needed to pay. So now they're shrine Maidens. Yang got stuck with the task of rituals and ceremonial dances.... Yeah she's less than thrilled.

Only Weiss left. What should her role be?

Artist~
